subject: [PATCH v7 02/10] mm/memory_hotplug: add mhp_online_type_to_str() and export string helpers

2026-07-12.patch_summary: This patch adds two string helper functions to the Linux kernel's memory hotplug module: mhp_online_type_to_str() and mhp_online_type_from_str(). The first function converts an online type integer into a human-readable string, while the second does the opposite. Both functions are exported so that drivers can use them in their sysfs interfaces.
